user_journeys.title: List my accounts ranked by balance (descending)
entry_points: Home tab 'บัญชีของฉัน'
Deep link from notification (out of scope)
Side-menu 'เปรียบเทียบยอดเงิน'

steps.action: Tap 'บัญชีของฉัน' from authenticated home
Render ranked list (balance DESC, accountId ASC tie-break)
Tap a row → navigate to account detail (out of scope)

error_paths.message: ยังไม่มีบัญชีที่ใช้งานอยู่. บัญชีที่ปิดหรือไม่เคลื่อนไหวจะไม่แสดงในหน้านี้.
Handled by app-shell auth interceptor — no in-component message
เกิดข้อผิดพลาดในการโหลดข้อมูล กรุณาลองใหม่อีกครั้ง
เกิดข้อผิดพลาดในการโหลดข้อมูล กรุณาลองใหม่อีกครั้ง (รหัสอ้างอิง: <correlationId>)

user_journeys.title: See per-account details (type, balance, currency, last updated)

steps.action: Render type label (Thai), masked number (*XXXX), formatted balance with currency, relative balance_as_of

error_paths.message: อาจไม่ใช่ยอดล่าสุด

steps.action: Show skeleton immediately on route entry
Render list on success — no skeleton flicker between renders

error_paths.trigger: Server reports meta.freshness=snapshot after fail-open (AC-003-E1, proposed contract)
error_paths.message: ยอดเงินอาจไม่เป็นปัจจุบัน ระบบใช้ข้อมูลล่าสุดที่บันทึกไว้

steps.action: Navigate with keyboard only (Tab / Shift+Tab / Enter)
Use VoiceOver / TalkBack to hear ranked list

error_paths.message: (sprint demo exit criterion — must not ship)

wireframes.title: Balance Dashboard — default (3-5 accounts)

components.content: บัญชีของฉัน + freshness subtitle (min(balance_as_of) across rows) + account count

components.label: ดึงลงเพื่อรีเฟรช

props: aria-label=ranked list of accounts highest balance first

accessibility: AccountList role=list with aria-label
AccountRow role=listitem; entire row is tap target ≥ 44dp
BalanceAmount aria-label uses full spoken form (e.g., '128,540 บาท 25 สตางค์')
Focus order = DOM order = visual rank order
Visible focus ring with ≥ 3:1 contrast (token in HI-FI)
wireframes.banking_notes: Masked account number never exceeds last-4 (BR-007). No total / aggregate (OPEN-001). No transfer CTA on row. Tie-break (accountId ASC) is invisible by design (AC-001-H2).

wireframes.title: Loading skeleton
accessibility: aria-busy on list region — screen reader announces loading
SkeletonRow itself aria-hidden so AT is not spammed
No content layout shift between skeleton and final row
wireframes.banking_notes: Default 3 skeleton rows — do not leak cached count (privacy). Keep skeleton up to cold-cache p95 ceiling (~800ms); do not flicker to error before that.

wireframes.title: Empty — no in-scope active accounts

props: title=ยังไม่มีบัญชีที่ใช้งานอยู่

components.label: เปิดบัญชีใหม่

accessibility: EmptyState role=status (not alert)
Illustration alt text provided
CTA disabled state communicated via aria-disabled
wireframes.banking_notes: Audit event STILL emitted with accountCount=0 (AC-001-E1) — UI does not gate this. Copy explicitly mentions dormant/closed exclusion to set expectations.

wireframes.title: Stale data warning (per-row badge + optional global banner)
wireframes.layout: global banner above list + per-row badge

components.label: อาจไม่ใช่ยอดล่าสุด

accessibility: Banner announced once via aria-live=polite (no focus steal)
Per-row badge carries explicit Thai text, not colour-only
RetrySoftButton ≥ 44dp tap target; aria-busy while in flight
wireframes.banking_notes: Per-row trigger: now() - balance_as_of > 60s threshold (BR-013). Global banner trigger: server signals meta.freshness=snapshot (proposed contract — see OPEN-D-005). balance_as_of null → row shows '—' (AC-002-E2).

wireframes.title: Hard error — retry

props: title=เกิดข้อผิดพลาดในการโหลดข้อมูล
subtitle=กรุณาลองใหม่อีกครั้ง

accessibility: ErrorState role=alert + aria-live=assertive (announces on render)
PrimaryButton ≥ 44dp; aria-busy while retrying
correlationId is read-only text (selectable for copy)
wireframes.banking_notes: Triggers: HTTP 5xx / 503 / network timeout. NOT 401 (auth redirects out). 403 IDOR attempt also lands here generically — DO NOT reveal cause. No bank-internal jargon.

wireframes.title: Single-account state

components.content: บัญชีของฉัน + '1 account'

props: rank visual chrome hidden; screen-reader announcement softened to 'your savings account ...'

accessibility: Screen reader does NOT announce 'Account 1 of 1' (clunky); uses softened template per interaction spec §6.1
Row still focusable and tappable (exit to detail)
wireframes.banking_notes: Avoid 'ranking' chrome when only one row — feels awkward and adds no information.

wireframes.title: 10-account density
accessibility: No horizontal scrolling at 375px even with 10 rows (BR-019, AC-005-H1)
200% font scale wraps gracefully, no clipping (AC-005-E1)
Scroll restoration on back-navigation
wireframes.banking_notes: No sticky header in v1 (defer to HI-FI if usability flags it). Trackable per accountId for performant Angular @for rendering.

key_interaction_decisions: Pull-to-refresh: YES in v1 (with keyboard-reachable refresh fallback). Optional drop path if FE flags effort risk.
Sticky header: NO in v1 — keeps implementation simple.
Rank visual badges: NO — communicate rank via DOM order + screen-reader 'Account N of M' announcement.
Tie-break visual: NONE — deterministic accountId ASC sort is invisible by design (AC-001-H2).
Long-press on 'Updated' label reveals absolute timestamp (DD MMM YYYY HH:mm ICT). Hover equivalent for pointer devices.
Stale signal: per-row badge when now() - balance_as_of > 60s; global banner when server signals meta.freshness=snapshot (proposed contract — see OPEN-D-005).
Reduced-motion: skeleton has no shimmer; pull-to-refresh spring suppressed; badge fade replaced with instant appearance.
Empty-state copy explicitly mentions dormant/closed exclusion (OPEN-003) so customers understand why they see no accounts.
Error state always shows correlationId for customer-support traceability; never reveals technical cause.

open_decisions_reflected.OPEN-001: Native currency only — no multi-currency total widget in any wireframe; per-row currency code always present (forward-compat for future US-BC-004).
open_decisions_reflected.OPEN-002: All 'Updated' labels reference balance_as_of, NEVER row updated_at. Per-row stale threshold (60s) applies to balance_as_of.
open_decisions_reflected.OPEN-003: No greyed-out / hidden indicator anywhere. Empty-state copy explains the rule once.
open_decisions_reflected.OPEN-004: No row templates for Loan or Credit Card. Only SAVINGS / CURRENT / FIXED_DEPOSIT labels in the type-label dictionary.

tested_against_ac: AC-005-H3 (keyboard Tab order = rank order, visible focus ring)
AC-005-H4 (Lighthouse ≥ 90 — to be verified by QA on demo URL)
AC-005-E2 (balance aria-label uses full spoken form)

top_open_questions_for_hifi: OPEN-D-001 — Design token / brand palette source (NO prior money-transfer Designer artifacts exist; needs decision in HI-FI).
OPEN-D-005 — Server signal for global 'snapshot served' freshness (proposed meta.freshness field) — requires SA-001 ADR.
OPEN-D-003 — Final Thai/English micro-copy + i18n key map (needs content-owner sign-off in HI-FI).

phase_2_gating.rationale: HI-FI tokens, component contracts, and meta.freshness payload shape depend on SA decisions (SUBDEC-001..004 + OPEN-D-005). Orchestrator must pause Designer Phase 2 invocation until SA-001 lands.
ready_to_start_hifi_when: OPEN-D-001 (token source) decision made — by Designer in concert with TL

handoff_notes_for_downstream.frontend_dev_preview: Angular standalone <balance-dashboard> component; lazy-loaded route; OnPush change detection; signals for local state; track-by accountId on @for; reactive HttpClient call. Render skeleton on initial load; do NOT use optimistic UI; wait for server. Format balance via Intl.NumberFormat('th-TH', {style:'currency', currency: 'THB'}) or Angular currency pipe. Pull-to-refresh in v1 (with refresh button as keyboard fallback). Reduced-motion query gates all animations.
handoff_notes_for_downstream.tech_lead_preview: OpenAPI response should include meta.freshness ('live'|'snapshot'|'stale') so UI can render global staleness banner — confirm in ADR (OPEN-D-005). Each account row needs: accountId, masked accountNumber (last-4 only), accountType enum (mapped to label client-side), balance (decimal 18,2), currency (ISO 4217), balance_as_of (ISO 8601 UTC). No full account number anywhere in the payload (BR-007).
handoff_notes_for_downstream.qa_p1_preview: Add a11y test cases for AC-005-H1..H4 + E1/E2 to QA P1 plan: 375px no horizontal scroll, VoiceOver/TalkBack announcement template, Tab/Shift+Tab order, Lighthouse mobile ≥ 90, 200% font reflow, balance aria-label full spoken form. Include test cases for stale-badge trigger (now() - balance_as_of > 60s) and global stale-banner (meta.freshness=snapshot).
handoff_notes_for_downstream.sa_preview: Designer Phase 1 assumes meta.freshness is exposed in the response. Please confirm or propose an alternative in SA-001 ADR. Also confirm batched AccountClient call shape so we know the response field names exactly.

metadata.notes: Designer Phase 1 (LO-FI) complete for balance-comparison. 7 screen states wireframed (default, loading, empty, stale, error, single, dense) — exceeds the ≥6 quality-gate bar. All 4 OPEN decisions (OPEN-001..004) baked into wireframes. WCAG 2.1 AA checklist mapped to every screen. Mobile-first 375px baseline used. No prior Designer artifacts existed for money-transfer (verified) — this LO-FI is the baseline for the design system across the workspace; Phase 2 will introduce tokens. Phase 2 HI-FI is GATED on SA-001 landing (per OPEN-D-005 and OPEN-D-014).
